programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2025: Bills vs. Jaguars - AFC Wild Card
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen put together his first career game-winning drive in the fourth quarter or overtime in the playoffs, thanks to some help from his defense and specifically veteran cornerback Tre'Davious White.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Justin Herbert capped a 318-yard, three-touchdown performance in a 27-21 victory over Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs on Friday night in São Paulo.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2025: Rams vs. Panthers - NFC Wild Card
programme.desc: After the Carolina Panthers rallied to gain a 31-27 lead with 2:39 remaining on a touchdown pass from quarterback Bryce Young to wide receiver Jalen Coker, Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford led Los Angeles on a go-ahead scoring drive.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: San Francisco 49ers quarterback Brock Purdy threw a 38-yard touchdown pass to Jauan Jennings with 2:15 left, and the 49ers forced an incomplete pass on the final play from the 2-yard line to beat the Chicago Bears 42-38 on Sunday night.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Giants and Cowboys duel in an NFC East classic showdown that features six lead changes in the fourth quarter and overtime as Russell Wilson and Malik Nabers look to outshine Dak Prescott and CeeDee Lamb.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Best Pick at Every Draft Spot (1-100)
programme.desc: From Peyton Manning to Mark Bavaro. Find out which player was the best at each draft slot in the top 100.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: No dream teams here. Take a look into ten teams that were successful despite lacking the desired talent.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Every Team's Biggest Win and Loss
programme.desc: Find out every NFL team's biggest win and most embarrassing defeat of the Super Bowl era.

programme.title: Game of the Week
programme.desc: Jahmyr Gibbs and David Montgomery ran for two touchdowns apiece, Detroit sacked Lamar Jackson seven times and the Lions bullied their way to a 38-30 win over Baltimore on Monday night.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Stefon Diggs had 10 catches for 146 yards, with 119 coming in the second half, in a 23-20 win over his former team, the Buffalo Bills, which was sealed by Andy Borregales hitting a 52-yard field goal with 15 seconds left.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jalen Hurts lets it fly as A.J. Brown and DeVonta Smith combine for 304 yards and 3 touchdowns as the Eagles outscore a Carson Wentz-led Vikings team 28-22.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jalen Hurts lets it fly as A.J. Brown and DeVonta Smith combine for 304 yards and 3 touchdowns as the Eagles outscore a Carson Wentz-led Vikings team 28-22.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Justin Herbert's immaculate fourth quarter touchdown toss to Keenan Allen keeps the Bolts undefeated on the season as they take down Bo Nix and the Broncos, 23-20.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competitors arrive in West Virginia for the chance to compete for a sponsor's exemption into the 2013 Greenbrier Classic and $50,000.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One player's quirky ways start to wear on the other contestants and tempers flare as they fight for immunity. Large obstacles block the path to immunity.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The intriguing history of America's Resort; another twist threatens to eliminate one of the season's most colorful characters.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A team competition allows one player a chance at the ultimate redemption. Miscues and missed opportunities force teams to turn on each others.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The contestants' shot-making abilities are put to the test right as they attempt to negotiate the infamous flop wall.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Players come face to face with elimination right from the start and the remaining competitors try their hand at Blackjack.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One competitor reaches his breaking point, while another's bad decision lands him in the elimination challenge.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A new, golf-inspired spin on an old hoops classic spells safety for one competitor.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Strategy and skill are paramount for the final four in head-to-head match-ups.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Down to the final three, one mistake could mean the difference between safety and elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The season culminates with a thrilling contest between two of the series most consistent performers.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers want to get the most out of the driver. They demonstrate what the pros look like at impact and share what to do to get into that position.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward cover all things long game from fairway metals to hybrids and even how to master the dreaded long irons. They also teach how finding the low point in the swing helps create consistent strikes.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain the big three in iron play: how to control distance, accuracy, and trajectory on shots. They also show a footwork drill to help ball striking and what to do to work the ball into those tucked pins.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain how to dial in distances with short irons and how to hit them on line every time; they also explain the bounce angle and how to choose the right amount.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers show how to play a variety of shots around the green, including the high spinning chip, low runner, and many more. They also explain the importance of focusing on a landing zone when hitting greenside shots.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain the necessary fundamentals to hit effective greenside and fairway bunker shots. They also explain how to hit it close from one of the most feared shots in the game, the 30-40-yard bunker shot.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Me and My Golf's Andy and Piers explain how to master judging speed and reads on the greens. They also demonstrate the proper mechanics for hitting it solid and making those clutch putts.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to master different lies on the course, featuring the buried lie, sitting up lie, and flyer lie.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain that the best play isn't always the hero shot. They demonstrate how save strokes by hitting over, under, and around trouble.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to save strokes by thinking around the course; they'll demonstrate how to take advantage of both sides of the tee-box and the importance of a good pre-shot routine.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair joins World Series champion Cody Ross to face NFL Hall of Famer Brian Urlacher and MLB star Mark Mulder in a match of bold moves.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal teams up with Sabrina Andolpho, founder of the influencer group Golf Girl Games, for competitions with athletes and celebrities.

programme.title: Glam Golf With Blair O'Neal
programme.desc: Blair O'Neal competes against Lucy Robson on the Riverside course at Portstewart Golf Club in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal give a road map to hit solid iron shots. Learn how to achieve impact while also improving arm structure and swing path. LPGA winner Gaby Lopez joins Martin & Blair on the range to reveal her favorite iron play drills.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal demonstrate how to become a ball flight commander. Learn how to hit powerful draws like Rory McIlroy, hit controlled fades like Collin Morikawa and hit the low stinger like Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal demonstrate how to become a ball flight commander. Learn how to hit powerful draws like Rory McIlroy, hit controlled fades like Collin Morikawa and hit the low stinger like Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots made famous by Open Champions at St. Andrews. Learn how to hit powerful draws like Tiger Woods, escape the rough like Seve Ballesteros, and stick wedges like John Daly.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the shots made famous by Open Champions at St. Andrews. Learn how to hit powerful draws like Tiger Woods, escape the rough like Seve Ballesteros, and stick wedges like John Daly.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to maximize power like the game's longest drivers. Martin explains how baseball and boxing can translate into a more powerful golf swing.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to maximize power like the game's longest drivers. Martin explains how baseball and boxing can translate into a more powerful golf swing.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the truth behind some of golf's greatest swing myths. Learn how to grip the club properly like Tiger Woods, hit more accurate irons like Padraig Harrington, and use Elvis Presley to add more distance.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the truth behind some of golf's greatest swing myths. Learn how to grip the club properly like Tiger Woods, hit more accurate irons like Padraig Harrington, and use Elvis Presley to add more distance.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the skills of golf's greatest champions; how to start the downswing like Jack Nicklaus and improve the swing path like Nick Faldo; guest Sophia Popov shares the drill that helped her win the 2020 AIG Women's Open.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the skills of golf's greatest champions; how to start the downswing like Jack Nicklaus and improve the swing path like Nick Faldo; guest Sophia Popov shares the drill that helped her win the 2020 AIG Women's Open.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: One of Georgia Tech's most accomplished golfers Stewart Cink, visits his alma mater's new practice facility, The Noonan, to discuss all things full swing with Brian Bateman.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: One of Georgia Tech's most accomplished golfers Stewart Cink, visits his alma mater's new practice facility, The Noonan, to discuss all things full swing with Brian Bateman.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Stewart Cink, 2009 Open Champion, visits his alma mater's new practice facility to discuss all things short game with Brian Bateman.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: From Georgia Tech's new practice facility, The Noonan, Stewart Cink discusses the putting drills, tips and lessons learned over his 20-plus year career.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to stop slices and hooks with the driver, improve tempo and rhythm with your irons and more.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to stop slices and hooks with the driver, improve tempo and rhythm with your irons and more.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to eliminate the chicken wing for more accuracy with the driver, fix fact contact with your irons.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - 2-Minute Drills
programme.desc: John Montgomery is teaching simple but effective drills that can be done pre-round to improve from tee-to-green. Learn how to eliminate the chicken wing for more accuracy with the driver, fix fact contact with your irons.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Playing Downwind and Into the Wind
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty breaks down the art of playing downwind and into the wind. Nick will guide you through techniques to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust your club selection to take full advantage of the wind.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide: Playing in the Wind
programme.sub-title: Right to Left Left to Right
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty teaches techniques and tips for achieving excellent golf performance when playing into the wind. He shows how to maximize distance, control trajectory, and adjust club selection to make the most of the weather conditions.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.

programme.title: Golfer's Guide - Swing Sequencing
programme.desc: Nathalie Sheehan is helping you add distance and hit more fairways with the driver by improving your sequence. Start at address, take the club back to the top, bring it down through impact and into the finish learning the biggest keys and drills.
